shared.title: Title
shared.description: A short description of the action that a user needs to complete, character count 120.
shared.label: Label
shared.cardDescription: Include a short description here that speaks to the value prop of the feature. Character limit of 120.

componentLibrary.title: Component Library
componentLibrary.subtitle: Living Design 3.5 Components
componentLibrary.overviewDescription: A comprehensive component library for the Walmart Connect Ad Center. Each component follows the Living Design 3.5 specification with proper accessibility, semantic tokens, and responsive behavior.
componentLibrary.sandboxDescription: Interactive testing environment for Living Design 3.5 components. Select a component and adjust its properties in real-time.
componentLibrary.selectToConfig: Select a component to configure its properties
componentLibrary.descAlerts: Banner messages for info, success, warning, and error states
componentLibrary.descBadges: Count badges, status indicators, and semantic color variants
componentLibrary.descBreadcrumbs: Navigation breadcrumbs with support for 2-5 levels and custom separators
componentLibrary.descButtons: Primary, secondary, tertiary, and destructive button variants with full accessibility
componentLibrary.descCallouts: Contextual tooltips with directional arrows for onboarding
componentLibrary.descCards: Card containers with headers, actions, and content areas
componentLibrary.descCheckboxes: Single and grouped checkboxes with indeterminate state support
componentLibrary.descChips: Interactive, selectable buttons for categories and selections
componentLibrary.descContentMessages: Full-page state messages for errors, permissions, and loading
componentLibrary.descDateFields: Text input fields for date entry with validation
componentLibrary.descDatePickers: Calendar popup for visual date selection
componentLibrary.descDividers: Horizontal and vertical separators for content sections
componentLibrary.descFilterChips: Pill-shaped toggleable chips with counts for filtering
componentLibrary.descFormGroups: Fieldset containers for checkbox and radio groups
componentLibrary.descIconButtons: Icon-only buttons for compact actions with ghost, primary, secondary variants
componentLibrary.descIcons: Complete icon library with 100+ React components organized by category
componentLibrary.descLinkButtons: Link-styled interactive elements with icon support and multiple sizes
componentLibrary.descLinks: Text links with icon support and semantic color variants
componentLibrary.descLists: Vertical lists with leading icons and trailing content
componentLibrary.descMagicBox: AI-powered loading animation with sparkle effects
componentLibrary.descMenu: Dropdown menus with keyboard navigation and positioning
componentLibrary.descMetrics: Display critical data points with trend indicators and units
componentLibrary.descModals: Centered overlay dialogs with size variants for focused user interactions
componentLibrary.descNudges: Non-critical supportive information with actions and dismissible states
componentLibrary.descPanels: Slide-out panels for supplemental content and forms with three size variants
componentLibrary.descProgressIndicator: Circular or linear progress indicators for loading states
componentLibrary.descProgressTracker: Step-by-step progress visualization for multi-step processes and workflows
componentLibrary.descRadioButtons: Mutually exclusive selection within a group
componentLibrary.descSelect: Dropdown select component with error states, AI-assisted variant, and full accessibility
componentLibrary.descSnackbars: Brief feedback messages that appear at the bottom of the screen
componentLibrary.descSpinners: Loading indicators for indeterminate processes with color and size variants
componentLibrary.descSpotIcons: Decorative icon containers with brand and neutral color variants
componentLibrary.descSwitches: Toggle controls for binary on/off settings with immediate state changes
componentLibrary.descTabNavigation: Page-level navigation tabs with selected state and icon support
componentLibrary.descTags: Compact labels for categorization, status, and metadata
componentLibrary.descTextArea: Multi-line text input with character counting and AI-generated content indicators
componentLibrary.descTextFields: Single-line text inputs with labels, error states, helper text, and icons
componentLibrary.descBottomSheet: Mobile-friendly modal that slides up from the bottom with LD 3.5 tokens
componentLibrary.descTable: Structured data table with header, body, and footer
componentLibrary.descAlertDialog: Modal dialog for important confirmations that interrupt user workflow
componentLibrary.descAvatar: User profile image with fallback initials and status indicators
componentLibrary.descCalendar: Date picker calendar with single and range selection
componentLibrary.descCarousel: Horizontal scrolling content carousel with navigation controls
componentLibrary.descChart: Data visualization charts with Recharts and LD 3.5 tokens
componentLibrary.descCommand: Command palette for fast keyboard-driven search and navigation
componentLibrary.descContextMenu: Right-click context menu with submenus and keyboard navigation
componentLibrary.descDialog: Modal overlay dialog for focused interactions
componentLibrary.descDropdownMenu: Dropdown menu with submenus, checkbox, and radio items
componentLibrary.descForm: Form components with validation, error handling, and accessible labels
componentLibrary.descMenubar: Horizontal menu bar with dropdown menus and keyboard navigation
componentLibrary.descNavigationMenu: Top-level navigation with multi-column dropdown panels
componentLibrary.descPagination: Navigation controls for paging through large data sets
componentLibrary.descPopover: Floating popover panel with arrow indicator
componentLibrary.descProgress: Horizontal progress bar for determinate operations
componentLibrary.descRadioGroup: Mutually exclusive radio buttons with Radix primitives
componentLibrary.descScrollArea: Custom scrollable container with styled scrollbars
componentLibrary.descSeparator: Visual divider in horizontal or vertical orientation
componentLibrary.descSheet: Side sheet overlay for supplemental content
componentLibrary.descSlider: Draggable slider for selecting numeric values within a range
componentLibrary.descSwitch: Toggle switch built with Radix primitives
componentLibrary.descToggle: Two-state button for toolbar actions and view modes
componentLibrary.buttonsPageDesc: Primary, secondary, tertiary, and destructive button variants with full accessibility support. All buttons use Living Design 3.5 semantic tokens and support multiple sizes.
componentLibrary.ratingNote: Rating is display-only (not interactive). Shows 0-5 stars with half-star support.
